repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Library Office of the Assistant Director for the Development of Collections records.

origination.label: Creator
origination.persname: Cornell University Library., Office of the Assistant Director for the Development of Collections

did.abstract: Correspondence, subject files, and records of library acquisitions kept by Dr. Felix Reichmann, Assistant Director.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, subject files, and records of library acquisitions kept by Dr. Felix Reichmann, Assistant Director.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Library Office of the Assistant Director for the Development of Collections records. #13-1-1084. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
